description.en: Use when a user wants to check how many signatures are needed to execute proposals in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the current quorum requirement.
description.de: Verwenden, wenn ein Benutzer überprüfen möchte, wie viele Unterschriften benötigt werden, um Vorschläge in einer Multi-Sig-Wallet auszuführen. Gibt die aktuelle Quorum-Anforderung zurück.
description.es: Use when a user wants to check how many signatures are needed to execute proposals in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the current quorum requirement.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to check how many signatures are needed to execute proposals in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the current quorum requirement.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to check how many signatures are needed to execute proposals in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the current quorum requirement.
description.it: Use when a user wants to check how many signatures are needed to execute proposals in a multi-sig wallet. Returns the current quorum requirement.

success.en: The MultiSig requires {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} signatures to execute actions.
success.de: Die MultiSig benötigt {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} Unterschriften, um Aktionen auszuführen.
success.es: The MultiSig requires {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} signatures to execute actions.
success.fr: The MultiSig requires {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} signatures to execute actions.
success.ro: The MultiSig requires {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} signatures to execute actions.
success.it: The MultiSig requires {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} signatures to execute actions.

info.en: This MultiSig wallet requires {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} board signatures to execute proposals
info.de: Diese MultiSig-Wallet benötigt {{QUORUM_NUMBER}} Vorstandsunterschriften, um Vorschläge auszuführen
